reasoning_content:
The user wants the layout of the provided document page extracted into a JSON object containing bounding boxes.

1.  **Identify the main sections:**
    *   Header (Logo, Title, Subtitle)
    *   Bullet point text
    *   Section 2.2.9 GPIO (Title, Description, Table 5)
    *   Section 2.2.10 VBUS_EN_SNK (Title, Description, Table 6)
    *   Footer text (paragraphs)
    *   Footer (Document ID, Page number)

2.  **Extract text and coordinates for each element:**

    *   **Header:**
        *   Logo: Top left.
        *   "STUSB4500": Top right.
        *   "Pin description": Top right, below title.

    *   **Bullet Point:**
        *   Text starting "At detachment..."

    *   **Section 2.2.9:**
        *   "2.2.9": Blue number.
        *   "GPIO": Bold title.
        *   Description text: "This pin is an active low..."
        *   Table 5 Title: "Table 5. GPIO pin configuration"
        *   Table 5 Content: Needs row-by-row extraction.
            *   Header row: NVM parameter, Pin name, Pin function, Value, Description.
            *   Row 1: 00b, SW_CTRL_GPIO, Software controlled GPIO..., Hi-Z, When bit #0...
            *   Row 1 (cont): 0, When bit #0 value is 1b
            *   Row 2: 01b (default), ERROR_RECOVERY, Hardware fault detection..., Hi-Z, No hardware fault detected
            *   Row 2 (cont): 0, Hardware fault detected
            *   Row 3: 10b, DEBUG, Debug accessory detection..., Hi-Z, No debug accessory detected
            *   Row 3 (cont): 0, Debug accessory detected
            *   Row 4: 11b, SINK_POWER, Indicates USB Type-C..., Hi-Z, Source supplies default...
            *   Row 4 (cont): 0, Source supplies 3.0 A...

    *   **Section 2.2.10:**
        *   "2.2.10": Blue number.
        *   "VBUS_EN_SNK": Bold title.
        *   Description text: "This pin allows the incoming..."
        *   Table 6 Title: "Table 6. VBUS_EN_SNK pin configuration"
        *   Table 6 Content:
            *   Header row: NVM parameter..., Pin function, Value, Description, Comment.
            *   Row 1: 0b (default), Enables VBUS power path..., Hi-Z, No source attached, Valid for all...
            *   Row 1 (cont): 0, Source attached
            *   Row 2: 1b, Enables VBUS power path only..., Hi-Z, No source attached or no PD explicit contract..., Valid for all...
            *   Row 2 (cont): 0, Source attached and PD explicit contract...

    *   **Footer Text:**
        *   Paragraph 1: "When POWER_ONLY_ABOVE_5V bit..."
        *   Paragraph 2: "This feature is suited..."
        *   Paragraph 3: "VBUS_EN_SNK pin is a high voltage..."

    *   **Footer:**
        *   "DS12499 - Rev 8": Bottom left.
        *   "page 8/42": Bottom right.

3.  **Construct JSON:** Assemble the extracted data into the requested format.
